thread.title: Stratford Superintendent Resigns After Reinstatement: Report
thread.title_full: Stratford Superintendent Resigns After Reinstatement: Report

author: Vincent Salzo
title: Stratford Superintendent Resigns After Reinstatement: Report
text:
[Schools](/connecticut/stratford/schools)
Stratford Superintendent Resigns After Reinstatement: Report
Stratford Superintendent Uyi Osunde recently reached a settlement agreement in a discrimination lawsuit against the school board.
STRATFORD, CT — Stratford Superintendent of Schools Uyi Osunde has [resigned from the district](https://www.ctpost.com/news/education/article/stratford-superintendent-resigns-settling-19936452.php) after reaching a settlement agreement with the Board of Education in a discrimination lawsuit he filed in April, according to the Connecticut Post.
The Post reports Osunde chose to resign and “pursue other opportunities” after the board decided to reinstate him from his leave of absence.
Read more at the Connecticut Post [here](https://www.ctpost.com/news/education/article/stratford-superintendent-resigns-settling-19936452.php).
